name: Counterfeit Caviar
recipeIngredient: 12 oz Tomatoes, peeled and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Position rack in the lowest third of the oven and preheat to 400°F.
2. Lightly oil a baking sheet.
3. Place the eggplant cut side down on the prepared sheet.
4. Bake until very soft, about 45 minutes.
5. Cool slightly. When cool enough to handle, peel and chop.
6. Heat 1/3 cup olive oil in a heavy large skillet over medium heat.
7. Add onion and garlic; cook until soft, stirring occasionally, about 10 minutes.
8. Mix in the eggplant, tomatoes, lemon juice, and cayenne pepper.
9. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Cook over low heat until thickened to spreading consistency, stirring frequently, about 10 minutes.
11. Cover and refrigerate until well chilled.
12. Can be prepared up to 2 days ahead.
13. Transfer to a serving bowl.
14. Sprinkle with parsley.
